fields.acceptance_criteria: ResizeHandle component with horizontal+vertical resize modes; rAF batching via web-sys requestAnimationFrame; document-level event listeners registered with on_cleanup removal hooks; cursor management during drag; touch event support (touch start/move/end) for mobile resize gestures; no memory leaks (Closure::into_js_value not forget); min/max size constraints; no clipping from overflow:hidden ancestors
